HomeDestinationsPeshok
West Bengal

Peshok

The Tea Garden Wonderland

Emerald tea bushes stretching to the horizon, terracotta soil paths weaving through plantations.

4.3
(64 reviews)
Darjeeling, West Bengal
mountainsnatureculturetrekking
21°C
Partly Cloudy
Explore

Overview

Introduction

Peshok is a beautiful area known for its tea gardens, the confluence of the Teesta and Rangeet rivers, and stunning valley views.

History

A major tea-producing area with colonial-era plantations and stunning river confluence views.

Altitude

1,200 m

Best Time

October to May

Temperature

Summer: 15-25°C | Winter: 2-10°C

Location

Darjeeling, West Bengal

Weather

Pleasant throughout the year

Summer

15-25°C

Winter

2-10°C

Monsoon

18-22°C

Gallery

Nearby Attractions

Viewpoint

Triveni Viewpoint

Confluence of Teesta and Rangeet rivers.

Heritage

Peshok Tea Garden

Vast tea plantations with factory tours.

KuboVista

River Confluence Beach

A sandy beach where two rivers meet.

Why visit: Unique geography and peaceful atmosphere

Viewpoints

panoramic

Triveni Viewpoint

Best view of river confluence.

Local Cuisine

Must-Try Dishes

MomosThukpaAloo DumSel RotiChhurpi Soup

Restaurants

Tea Garden Restaurant

4.2

Local & Continental • ₹300-500

Meals amidst tea gardens.

Cafes

Tea Lounge

4.5

Specialty: Darjeeling Tea

Taste the finest Peshok tea.

Street Food

Momo Stall at Main Market

Freshly steamed and fried momos with spicy chutney

Thukpa Corner

Hot noodle soup with local vegetables and meat

Shopping

Tea Outlet

Fresh tea from the garden.

First FlushGreen TeaOolongTea accessories

Culture & Festivals

Culture

Rich Himalayan culture with Buddhist monasteries and Nepali traditions.

LosarBuddha JayantiDashainTihar

Adventure Activities

Tea Garden Walk

Easy

Guided walk through tea plantations.

2 hrs
₹500

Suggested Itineraries

Activities

  • • Tea garden walk
  • • Triveni viewpoint
  • • River beach
Lunch, Tea tasting
Taxi from Darjeeling
N/A
₹1,500

How to Reach

train

Nearest railway station is New Jalpaiguri (NJP)

~3 hrs drive
₹150-500

flight

Nearest airport is Bagdogra (IXB)

~2.5 hrs drive
₹3,000-8,000

bus

Direct buses from Siliguri and Darjeeling

~3-4 hrs
₹200-400

car

Private taxis and shared jeeps available

~2.5 hrs
₹2,500-4,000

Nearby Railway

New Jalpaiguri Junction (NJP) - 72 km

Nearby Airport

Bagdogra Airport (IXB) - 78 km

Taxi Fare

Shared: ₹150-200, Private: ₹2,500-3,500

Bike Rental

₹500-800/day (Royal Enfield/Scooty)

Frequently Asked Questions

October to May offers clear skies and pleasant weather.
